name: Synup offers free trials for their local marketing product amidst major enhancements and updates
news_content:
‍New York, NY: Synup, a leading SaaS provider of local and digital marketing solutions, today announced significant enhancements to their local listings and reputation management product. The company added 11 new publishing partners, expanding their network to 70+ providers. Synup also announced their newly-available free trial - the first of its kind in the local marketing industry.

Synup added a slew of publishers to their network, including Passpages, GalacticVibe, LocalizedListing, JerseyshoreVIP, DateonDeals, CherryHillVIP, MoorestownVIP, YourtownVIP, OpenPlaces, Swarm, and Whereto. With a widened publisher network, Synup enables its partners to amplify their online presence and strengthen their business’ reputation. By adding major performance-driving components, a widened publisher base, and a refreshed design, Synup continues to be a key partner for businesses seeking to improve their local and digital presence. 

“We have created a frictionless, streamlined experience that enables businesses to onboard themselves seamlessly to the platform. Additionally, the performance-driven listings enhancements will offer unmatched benefits to customers in terms of outcomes and investment,” stated Ravi Petlur, Synup’s Chief Technology Officer. 

Synup is the first company in its field to offer a free trial of a full-fledged listing and reputation management product. Businesses can now try the product for thirty days. With the free trial, Synup aims to address the demand from the 32 million SMBs in the United States alone, with a global total of over 300 million. The company believes that local marketing is becoming more important for businesses worldwide as consumers are increasingly searching for local goods and services online. 

“Synup’s innovation has always been market-driven. We anticipated that businesses would start demanding direct access to their marketing strategy. And businesses need new answers to new challenges. With the performance enhancements and the free trial, we’ll let the product do the talking to address the challenges of modern businesses,” said Ashwin Ramesh, Synup’s Founder and CEO.

With Synup's free trial, brands can connect their Google Business Profiles, create listings for new locations, and submit their listings to more than 70 business directories. The free trial includes all paid features, including multi-directory listings, review management and acquisition, easy automations, smart campaigns for posting on Google, and Google Messages integration.

Synup's intelligent local marketing product boasts a cohort of over 600,000 businesses. With smart automation recipes to manage listings, reviews, and messages for multiple locations from a single dashboard, Synup is the industry favorite for multi-location businesses and small operations alike.

seo.title: Synup offers free trials for their local marketing product amidst major enhancements and updates
seo.description: Synup delivers effective local marketing solutions. Enhance local listings and reputation with 11 new partners and a free trial. Boost online exposure with multi-directory listings and review management. Try Synup now.
